name: Lexicographer Review (Robert Farren, 2026-05-26)
short_description: Independent lexicographer review by Robert Farren MA (Linguistics), CertTrans of 363 suspicious Maru2022 ALL_NEW items, saved via the marureview.com tool on 2026-05-26 under the shared 'one sense by default' brief with a typed cannot_answer taxonomy.
size_description: 363 verdicts on suspicious Maru2022 ALL_NEW items (one JSON file with `saved_at`, `total_items`, `reviewed`, `verdicts`; each verdict carries `instance_id`, `chosen_sense_keys`, a typed `cannot_answer` list whose on-disk values are `__no_sense_applies__`, `__inventory_inadequate__`, `__input_defective__`, plus `cannot_answer_notes` and `comment`). 49 items carry a non-empty `cannot_answer` flag (45 `__no_sense_applies__`, 6 `__inventory_inadequate__`, 2 `__input_defective__`); 5 verdicts pick more than one sense. The annotation protocol is documented in the reviewer brief at https://marureview.com/brief, mirrored in `sources/reviews/protocols/marureview-brief-2026-05-26.md`.

files.description: Robert Farren's 363 verdicts on suspicious Maru2022 ALL_NEW items, saved 2026-05-26 via the marureview.com tool
